ddt:Target.Name: SID 304 - Rm4 610 - V04
ddt:Target.Description:
Applications K9K step 2 FAP X84, J77, X85 et 84 ph 2 pour la version soft RM4 610 Siemens Base Diag on CAN uniquement Crée le 07/06/2007 Pilote Systeme : Thomas Villermin (Sogeti / SiemensVDO) thomas.villermin-renexter@renault.com ____________________________________________________ ATTENTION : UTILISER CETTE BASE POUR LE SOFT RM4 610.
Version V04: Evolution à partir de la base "SID 304 - RM4 610_V03_Draft" -Correction ReadFreezeFrame (suppression des Octets 30 à 39) -Correction ReadFreezeFrame_15. -Correction ReadFreezeFrame_27. -Correction ReadFreezeFrame_10. (Nouvel appairage du DTC $2610) -Correction ReadFreezeFrame_16. (Ajout de V_DCDC>>2) -Correction ReadFreezeFrame_39. (suppression dist, eng_state et TCO) -Correction ReadFreezeFrame (transformé en "générique") calib à 0 -Correction ReadFreezeFrame_11 -Correction ReadFreezeFrame_12 (Octet 32 à 39) -Correction ReadFreezeFrame_37 (suppression de l'octet 34) -DTC $2610 rattaché à la ReadFF_10 -DTC $0045 rattaché à la ReadFF_3 -DTC $1644 rattaché à la ReadFF_39 -DTC $2458, $2080, $2084, $2269, $2459, $242B rattaché à la ReadFF -DTC $2263 rattaché à la ReadFF_11. -DTC $0235 rattaché à la ReadFF_12. -Data: ajout de V_DCDC sur 8 bits, FUP_DIF sur 8bits, EGR valve position voltage_1

Data.Name: ASD regeneration validity
Data.Description:
The successful regeneration state is indicated by the value of "SF_RGN_PF_ASA_END".

6. If the heating state doesn't increase the CSF temperature, the state machine goes through

the failure state, which modifies the "SF_RGN_PF_ASA_END" value in 2 and the high idle

speed request is nil.

7. During the after sale regeneration, if some defaults appear (default injection, sensor...) or if

the speed vehicle is upper a threshold (state vs_condition) or if several condition are not

fulfilled, the Failure state is activated.

Data.Name: Oil evaporation distance since last regeneration failure to allow regeneration
Data.Comment: Vxx_pft_rgn_err_vh_dist :Useful distance for oil evaporation since last regeneration failure to allo
Data.Description: DIST_OIL_EVAP_RGN_DFT represents the useful distance for oil evaporation since last regeneration failure: when the distance counter is greater than the output of "IP_DIST_MIN_RGN_DFT" map, this condition is active.

Data.Name: Maximum oil dilution rate
Data.Comment: Vxx_pft_oil_dil_max :Maximum oil dilution rate during the calibrated distance
Data.Description:
The maximum value CONC_FUEL_OIL_MAX_RGN present in the oil dilution table is calculated permanently.

IP_EVAP_FUEL gives the quantity to be evaporate, as a fraction of the maximum oil dilution rate CONC_FUEL_OIL_MAX_RGN calculated in the dilution model during a calibrated distance.This quantity is corrected by the factor C_FAC_EVAP_FUEL_OIL_PF and by the interpolation table IP_EVAP_COR_FUEL depending on the calculated oil temperature TOIL_CLC).

Data.Name: Oil dilution rate at engine start
Data.Comment: Vxx_rgn_sta_oil_dil :oil dilution rate at regeneration start
Data.Description: At the regeneration start, the current oil dilution is stored in the variable CONC_FUEL_OIL_RGN_ST.

Data.Name: Oil evaporation delay since last regeneration failure to allow regeneration
Data.Comment: Vxx_pft_rgn_err_t_ctr :Useful time for oil evaporation since last regeneration failure to allow rege
Data.Description: T_OIL_EVAP_RGN_DFT represents the useful time for oil evaporation since last regeneration failure: in fact, the curve IP_TOIL_T_DFT_COR permits to count the time in charging state with a factor depending on oil temperature. T_OIL_EVAP_RGN_DFT is reset when the regeneration failure is active.

Data.Name: Estimated soot mass by backpressure
Data.Comment: Vxx_pft_ms_dp :Filtered value of soot mass for backpressure estimation.

Data.Name: Estimated soot mass
Data.Comment: Vxx_pft_ms_cor :estimated soot mass
Data.Description:
Calculation of soot mass estimator :

The principle task of this function is to determine the amount of soot in the filter from the differential pressure signal, the air mass flow and the charge in engine speed.

Data.Name: Present failure for the vehicle speed request state
Data.Comment: Vbx_pf_spd_req :Present failure for the vehicle speed request state.
Data.Description:
The failure message LV_SYM_VS_REQ is the interface for the CAN information to the dashboard.

The variable "LV_SYM_VS_REQ" must be stored in EEPROM during the power latch event and restored during the key on event.

Data.Name: Successful regeneration
Data.Comment: Vbx_pft_rgn_ok :Indicates a successful regeneration
Data.Description: The Boolean "LV_PF_RGN_OK", indicating a successful or a failed regeneration must be stored in EEPROM during the power latch event and restored during the key on event.

Data.Name: Regeneration allowed by oil conditions
Data.Comment: Vbx_pft_oil_rgn_ena :regeneration allowed by oil conditions
Data.Description: During the charging or regeneration mode, the regeneration is not allowed or is cut off by the boolean LV_CONC_FUEL_OIL_RGN_ENA if the oil temperature exceeds the threshold values
